name: AuRico Gold Inc.
description: AuRico Gold Inc. was a Canadian gold and silver producing company with mines and projects in North America. Headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, the company operated the Young-Davidson gold mine in northern Ontario and the El Chanate mine in Sonora State, Mexico. In 2015, AuRico Gold merged with Alamos Gold in a transaction valued at $1.5 billion, creating a leading intermediate gold producer under the Alamos Gold name.
